preamble: The shift from [ʌ] to the diphthong [ɔɪ] or [ɒɪ] involves rounding and diphthongization. While phonetically plausible, documented examples of this specific transition from [ʌ] are limited in the linguistic literature and primarily observed in theoretical phonetic frameworks.

examples.note: Theoretical pathway of rounding and diphthongization; not currently documented in established sound change literature.
